title: Junior Business Development Manager at Embassy Office Parks REIT

jsonLd.title: Junior Business Development Manager at Embassy Office Parks REIT
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Business Development Manager looking for your next big career move? Embassy Office Parks REIT in Hyderabad offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Embassy Office Parks REIT:
Embassy Office Parks REIT is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in AutoCAD

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Maternity and paternity leave
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Professional development and training programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Hyderabad, Telangana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Embassy Office Parks REIT!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
